CustomField.description: Tracks whether the development team has sent a year-end thank-you to this donor. Manually checked by staff after outreach is completed. Use the Year-End Thank You Pending report to find donors who still need to be thanked.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this box once you have sent a year-end thank-you to this donor. See the Year-End Thank You Pending report to manage your outreach queue.
CustomField.label: Year End Thank You Sent
